name: brian-dear-career-mcp
description: A recruiter-facing MCP server for querying Brian Dear's career data.

scripts.dev:mcp:ollama: tsc && CAREER_AI_PROVIDER=ollama OLLAMA_MODEL=qwen3:4b CAREER_AI_TIMEOUT_MS=30000 node dist/server.js
scripts.dev:web:ollama: tsc && CAREER_AI_PROVIDER=ollama OLLAMA_MODEL=qwen3:4b CAREER_AI_TIMEOUT_MS=30000 node dist/web.js
scripts.demo:ollama: tsc && CAREER_AI_PROVIDER=ollama OLLAMA_MODEL=qwen3:4b CAREER_AI_TIMEOUT_MS=30000 node dist/cli.js demo
scripts.ask:ollama: tsc && CAREER_AI_PROVIDER=ollama OLLAMA_MODEL=qwen3:4b CAREER_AI_TIMEOUT_MS=30000 node dist/cli.js ask
scripts.ask:bedrock: tsc && CAREER_AI_PROVIDER=bedrock BEDROCK_TIMEOUT_MS=15000 node dist/cli.js ask

author: Brian Dear
